Underweight.message: Your BMI is below the healthy range. Consider consulting a healthcare professional and maintaining a balanced diet.

Normal.message: Your BMI is within the healthy range. Keep maintaining a balanced diet and regular physical activity.

Overweight.message: Your BMI is above the healthy range. Consider regular exercise and a healthy eating plan.

Obese.message: Your BMI falls in the obesity range. It is recommended to consult a healthcare professional for guidance.
